name: Champion Homes, Inc.
business: Champion Homes is a leading producer of factory-built housing in North America, designing and building manufactured and modular homes, park model RVs, accessory dwelling units (ADUs), and modular buildings for single and multi-family markets. The company also operates a factory-direct manufactured home retail business, construction services, and a transportation logistics business. Products are marketed and distributed through independent and company-owned retail sales centers, community operators, government agencies, and builder/developers.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading producer of factory-built housing in North America with net sales for the year ended March 28, 2026 (fiscal 2026) of approximately $2.7 billion.
We also operate Star Fleet Trucking, which provides transportation services to the manufactured housing and other industries from several dispatch locations across the United States.
During fiscal 2025, we began lending activities through Champion Financing, our joint venture with Triad Financial Services.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Iseman Homes with 10 retail sales centers
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, the Company acquired Iseman Homes which operated 10 retail sales centers across the North Central U.S.

catalysts.event: Idling of Bartow, Florida plant and cessation of Kelowna, British Columbia plant
catalysts.sentence: During the first half of fiscal 2026, the Company idled production at the Bartow, Florida manufacturing plant and ceased operations at the Kelowna, British Columbia manufacturing plant.

catalysts.event: Increase in share repurchase authorization by $50 million
catalysts.sentence: In May, 2026, the Board of Directors approved an increase to the share repurchase program of $50.0 million to refresh the available amount to $150.0 million.

catalysts.event: Close of ECN Capital acquisition by private investor group
catalysts.sentence: The transaction closed on April 24, 2026, which resulted in the liquidation of the Company's investment in ECN common and preferred shares in the first quarter of fiscal 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Industry manufactured home shipments were 100,380 units in fiscal 2026, 105,206 in fiscal 2025, and 92,288 in fiscal 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data reported by MHI, industry manufactured home shipments were 100,380, 105,206, and 92,288 units during fiscal 2026, 2025, and 2024, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: Manufactured housing wholesale shipments accounted for an estimated 10% of all new single-family homes starts in the 2025 calendar year.
tamClaims.sentence: According to statistics published by the Institute for Building Technology and Safety ("IBTS") and the United States Department of Commerce, Bureau of the Census, for the 2025 calendar year, manufactured housing wholesale shipments of homes constructed in accordance with the HUD code accounted for an estimated 10% of all new single-family homes starts.
